# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    name: MyVNet
    location: <your_location>
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        - 192.168.0.0/16
      subnets:
        - name: WebSubnet
          addressPrefix: 192.168.1.0/24
        - name: AppSubnet
          addressPrefix: 192.168.2.0/24
        - name: DatabaseSubnet
          addressPrefix: 192.168.3.0/24

outputs:
  - name: VNetName
    value: MyVNet
  - name: WebSubnetName
    value: WebSubnet
  - name: AppSubnetName
    value: AppSubnet
  - name: DatabaseSubnetName
    value: DatabaseSubnet
